name: axint
description: Compile TypeScript into native Apple App Intents. Define once, ship to Siri, Shortcuts, and Spotlight.
long_description:
Axint is the open-source compiler that turns TypeScript defineIntent() calls into native Swift AppIntent structs. Scaffold intents from a description, compile to production-ready Swift, and validate against Apple's SDK — all from Claude Desktop.

Includes 12+ pre-built templates covering messaging, productivity, health, commerce, media, navigation, and smart home domains.

tools.name: axint_scaffold
tools.description: Generate a new TypeScript intent file from a name, description, and parameter list

tools.name: axint_compile
tools.description: Compile a TypeScript intent definition into native Swift code

tools.name: axint_validate
tools.description: Validate a TypeScript intent definition and return diagnostics

tools.name: axint_list_templates
tools.description: List all available pre-built intent templates, optionally filtered by category

tools.name: axint_template
tools.description: Get the full TypeScript source of a specific intent template
